products.name: Agent Insider Subscription
products.description: Get weekly AI intelligence reports and agent protocols through the Agent Insider subscription. Each month includes exclusive deep-dive newsletters analyzing agentic commerce trends, curated AI signal summaries, and access to enterprise-grade automation frameworks Elevationary uses with Fortune 500 clients.

products.name: 15-Minute AI Strategy Introductory Consultation
products.description: A focused 15-minute introductory AI strategy session to assess your organization's most pressing AI questions. Ideal for executives exploring whether AI modernization is right for their organization, this consultation delivers an honest assessment and immediate clarity on your first steps toward AI-enabled transformation.

products.name: 30-Minute AI Readiness Consultation
products.description: A deep 30-minute AI readiness consultation that evaluates your organization's genuine AI maturity and identifies quick-win automation opportunities. Drawing on the P4D3 methodology, this session maps your operational gaps, assesses data governance readiness, and outlines a prioritized AI adoption path tailored to your business architecture.

products.name: 60-Minute AI Strategy Consultation
products.description: A comprehensive 60-minute AI strategy consultation that moves your organization from AI experimentation to disciplined execution. Using Elevationary's P4D3 framework, we evaluate your infrastructure, data sovereignty posture, and leadership alignment — then build a strategic roadmap for deploying a secure, autonomous digital workforce tailored to your operational environment.

products.name: 90-Minute AI Strategy In-depth Consultation
products.description: A comprehensive 90-minute AI strategy deep-dive designed for enterprises ready to architect a sovereign, autonomous digital workforce. This session delivers a complete Current State Analysis, Future State architecture vision, Gap Analysis, and a phased deployment roadmap — everything your executive team needs to move from AI strategy to precision implementation with zero vendor lock-in.
